case_title: JON A. CARROLL VS. ROBERT M. LUBIN

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARROLL, JON A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUBIN, ROBERT M. $5,635.00 PRINCIPAL, $154.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,789.50, THE COURT AWARDS DAMAGES OF $7500.00 AND ATTRIBUTES 25% COMPARATIVE FAULT TO PLAINTIFF; THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED (SERVICE FEE $79.50) SERVED JAN-12-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LUBIN, ROBERT M.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARROLL, JON A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUBIN, ROBERT M. $5,788.50 PRINCIPAL, $5,781.57 INTEREST, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,665.07, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-04-2009 - JUDGMENT.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $5,781.57 ACCRUED INTEREST, $95.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT LUBIN, ROBERT M.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY CARROLL, JON A. AS TO DEFENDANT LUBIN, ROBERT M. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-04-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO FARMERS INSURANCE CO.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-04-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-04-2009 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARROLL, JON A. AS TO DEFENDANT LUBIN, ROBERT M. NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED
